item.description:
Recappi Mini v1.0.109 — Crash and diagnostics reporting

- Added Sentry crash and diagnostics reporting for release builds.
- Captures crashes, uncaught Objective-C exceptions, app hangs, SIGTERM, and MetricKit diagnostics.
- Sends sanitized Recappi diagnostics for recording, Cloud, authentication, billing, settings, live captions, and app lifecycle failures.
- Keeps privacy guardrails: no audio, transcript, summary, prompt text, tokens, full URLs, or full local paths are sent.
